Transportation by Metrobus; It provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and crossing the road through the overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Kısıklı Street and turn to İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Street. 250m ahead is Üsküdar University - Central Campus.

TRANSPORTATION BY FERRY AND MOTORBOAT:

Arrival by Private Vehicle

D-100 - Arrival from Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar -Kadıköy Turnoff (the second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the Central Campus at University Street No:14.

D-100 - Arrival from Ankara Direction

Before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge, take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar- Ümraniye. Continue left at the intersection. Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the Central Campus at University Street No:14.

Arrival from TEM Highway

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the main road. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the Central Campus at University Street No:14.

*** Our directional signs that can help you in and around Altunizade are hanging on the electricity poles.

Transportation by Metrobus; It provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and going down to the road through the overpasses, you can reach Üsküdar University South Campus by walking 5 minutes along Mahir İz Street (opposite Capitol).

TRANSPORTATION BY FERRY AND MOTORBOAT:

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. Kadıköy buses and minibuses from Üsküdar Square get off in front of Bağlarbaşı Capitol.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

D-100 - Arrival from Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar-Kadıköy Turnoff (the second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue on the left side of Kısıklı Street and take the first left turn after entering Nuh Kuyusu Street. South Campus is 100m ahead on the left.

D-100 - Arrival from Ankara Direction

Take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar-Ümraniye before the Bosphorus Bridge. Continue left at the intersection. After entering Nuh Kuyusu Street by continuing on the left side of Kısıklı Street, take the first left turn. South Campus is 100m ahead on the left.

Arrival from TEM Highway

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the main road. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue along Kısıklı Street and take the first left turn after entering Nuh Kuyusu Street. After 100 meters, you will reach the South Campus on the left.

*** Our directional signs that can help you in and around Altunizade are hanging on the electricity poles.

Transportation by Metrobus; It provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and crossing the road through the overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Kısıklı Street and turn to İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Street. From the bus and minibus stops, you can reach the Çarşı Campus with the bus numbers specified in

Transportation by Public Transportation

(10 minutes by public transportation).

TRANSPORTATION BY FERRY AND MOTORBOAT:

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü Piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. A 5-minute walk will take you to the Bazaar Campus at Selman-ı Pak Street No:4.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

D-100 - Arrival from Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar-Kadıköy Turnoff (second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue to Kısıklı Street and cross to Selman-ı Pak Street and arrive at the Bazaar Campus at No:4.

D-100 - Arrival from Ankara Direction

Before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge, take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar- Ümraniye. Continue left at the intersection. Continuing on Kısıklı Street and crossing to Selman-ı Pak Street, you will arrive at the Bazaar Campus at No:4.

Arrival from TEM Highway

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the main road. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and cross Selman-ı Pak Street to reach the Bazaar Campus at No:4.

*** Our directional signs that can help you in and around Altunizade are hanging on the electricity poles.

FACULTY OF MEDICINE NP CAMPUS TRANSPORTATION:

Transportation by subway

provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. Students coming from the European side by metrobus can transfer from Altunizade metrobus stop; students coming by ferry can transfer to the M5 Üsküdar-Ümraniye subway across Üsküdar Pier; students coming from the Anatolian side can get off at Çakmak stop using the M5 Üsküdar-Ümraniye subway and after getting off at exit 1, they can reach the Faculty of Medicine at No:27 by walking approximately 10 minutes from Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street.

NO

NAME

11ÜS

Sultanbeyli - Uskudar

9ÜD

14

14B

20Ü

Take the minibuses departing from Üsküdar University Çarşı Campus and passing through Altunizade Mahir İz Street, get off at Ümraniye İSKİ stop and walk 10 minutes along Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street to reach the Faculty of Medicine at No:27.

ARRIVAL BY PRIVATE CAR

D-100 - Arrival from Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridge, you can reach the Faculty of Medicine at No:27 via Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street by connecting to Küçüksu Street from the Şile Highway exit.

Students coming from July 15th Martyrs Bridge can cross the bridge and after connecting to the Şile Highway, they can reach the Faculty of Medicine at No:27 via Küçüksu Street.

Arrival from D-100 Ankara Direction

After connecting to the Ring Road from the Kozyatağı O2 connection, take the Şile Highway exit, connect to Küçüksu Street and reach the Faculty of Medicine at No:27 via Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street.

Arrival from Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge (3rd Bridge)

After crossing Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge, exit the Paşaköy Highway toll plaza and connect to the 2nd Ring Road. From the Şile Highway exit, it connects to Küçüksu Street and reaches the Faculty of Medicine at No:27 via Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street.

Transportation by subway

provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. Students coming by metrobus from the European side can transfer from Altunizade metrobus station; students coming by ferry can transfer to M5 Üsküdar-Ümraniye subway across Üsküdar Pier; students coming from the Anatolian side can use M5 Üsküdar-Ümraniye subway, get off at Çakmak stop, exit at exit no. 1 and walk approximately 10 minutes from Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street to reach NP Health Campus at Saray Mahallesi Ahmet Tevfik İleri Caddesi No:5 ÜMRANİYE/İSTANBUL.

TRANSPORTATION BY MINIBUS: They can take the minibuses departing from Üsküdar University Çarşı Campus and passing through Altunizade Mahir İz Street, get off at Ümraniye İSKİ stop, walk 10 minutes on Dr. Fazıl Küçük Street and reach the NP Health Campus at Saray Mahallesi Ahmet Tevfik İleri Caddesi No: 5 ÜMRANİYE/İSTANBUL.

ARRIVING BY PRIVATE CAR:

Arrival from D-100 - Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridge, they can connect to Küçüksu Street from the Şile Highway exit and reach the NP Health Campus in Saray Mahallesi Ahmet Tevfik İleri Caddesi No:5 ÜMRANİYE/İSTANBUL via Dr. Fazıl Küçük Caddesi.

Students coming from the 15 July Martyrs Bridge can cross the bridge and after connecting to the Şile Highway, they can reach the NP Health Campus in Saray Mahallesi Ahmet Tevfik İleri Caddesi No:5 ÜMRANİYE/İSTANBUL via Küçüksu Street.

Arrival from D-100 Ankara Direction

After connecting to the Ring Road from the Kozyatağı O2 connection, they can connect to Küçüksu Street from the Şile Highway exit and reach the NP Health Campus at Saray Mahallesi Ahmet Tevfik İleri Caddesi No:5 ÜMRANİYE/İSTANBUL via Dr. Fazıl Küçük Caddesi.

Arrival from Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge (3rd Bridge)

After crossing Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge, exit the Paşaköy Highway toll booths and connect to the 2nd Ring Road. From the Şile Highway exit, they can connect to Küçüksu Street and reach the NP Health Campus in Saray Mahallesi Ahmet Tevfik İleri Caddesi No:5 ÜMRANİYE/İSTANBUL via Dr. Fazıl Küçük Caddesi.

TRANSPORTATION TO NAKKAŞTEPE FEMALE STUDENT GUESTHOUSE:

Transportation by Metrobus provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and crossing the road through the overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Kısıklı Street and turn to İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Street. 500 meters ahead is the Guest House.

TRANSPORTATION BY FERRY AND MOTORBOAT:

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. From Üsküdar Square, get off at Bağlarbaşı-Altunizade with Kadıköy buses and minibuses. İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. 500 m after reaching the Guest House.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

D-100 - Arrival from Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar -Kadıköy Turnoff (the second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the Student Guest House at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.

D-100 - Arrival from Ankara Direction

Before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge, take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar- Ümraniye. Continue left at the intersection. Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the student guesthouse at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.

Arrival from TEM Highway

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the main road. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the student guesthouse at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.

*** Our direction signs that can help you in and around Altunizade are hanging on the electricity poles.
